About Me

I build things that actually ship.

Developer focused on backend logic, clean architecture, and interfaces people enjoy using.

I'm a full-stack web developer with 4+ years of experience building production web applications from e-commerce stores and team collaboration platforms to government administrative systems and crypto landing pages.

My stack is deliberate: PHP and MySQL for robust, performant backends; vanilla JavaScript with AJAX for real-time interfaces; and Tailwind CSS for interfaces that look sharp without the bloat.

I care about shipping working software understanding requirements, designing solid data schemas, and building systems that hold up under real-world conditions.

Scalable Architecture

Systems designed to grow clean separation, structured data schemas, maintainable codebases.

Real-time Interfaces

AJAX-powered UIs with live activity feeds, instant state updates, and reactive form systems.

Secure by Design

Auth systems, role-based access, input sanitization security built in from day one.

UI/UX Obsessed

Responsive, accessible, visually coherent interfaces that feel deliberate, not accidental.
